concerns.text: The plan cites a STRING high‑confidence interaction file with the URL `https://huggingface.co/datasets/polinaeterna/test_string_to_dict/resolve/main/data/train-00000-of-00001-3e7bb60eb6e19f8c.parquet`, which is not the official STRING download (STRING provides `protein.links.v11.5.txt.gz` from `https://string-db.org/download/`). Using an unrelated parquet dataset would invalidate the benchmark and break the evaluation against the required combined‑score ≥ 700 reference.
